title: Surgeon Vacancy at Becton Dickinson India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Becton Dickinson India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Becton Dickinson India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!
